response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of strong full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with the role's emphasis on agentic workflows and MCP servers. However, the resume shows limited depth in production GenAI delivery, no explicit experience with Python, RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI, and no demonstrated customer-facing technical leadership at the scale expected of a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer.
strengths: Senior/Staff-level engineering experience across 13+ years with strong full-stack and systems background
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Proven workshop/teaching/mentorship track record (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, conference talks)
concerns: No Python experience listed; skills are TypeScript/DLang/Java-centric
No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience on resume
No clear customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery experience with enterprise clients

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and RAG/vector DB experience
Lack of enterprise customer-facing delivery experience
